crossref.abstract: <jats:p>This study demonstrated the successful epitaxy of La-SrSnO<jats:sub>3</jats:sub>/BaTiO<jats:sub>3</jats:sub> on SrTiO<jats:sub>3</jats:sub>-buffered Si (001) with ALD-deposited La-SrSnO<jats:sub>3</jats:sub> and explored the optimization of post-annealing to enhance the capacitance properties of heterostructure.</jats:p>
title: Post-annealing optimization of the heteroepitaxial La-doped SrSnO3 integrated on silicon via ALD
